description: Ordered course assignments within a learning path, enriched with capability gap and role readiness data. One row per learner + course + path. Each row represents one level transition for one capability gap — tracking both the course progression state and the gap analysis that drove the course assignment. This is the single source of truth for course sequencing, gap engine output, and recommendation priority.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique record identifier

fields.name: learner_id
fields.description: Learner this course assignment belongs to

fields.name: learning_path_id
fields.description: Learning path this course belongs to

fields.name: role_id
fields.description: The role this course is being assigned against. Each learning path targets one role.

fields.name: course_id
fields.description: Course from the course catalog. Each course maps to one capability at one proficiency level.

fields.name: sequence_no
fields.description: Overall display order of this course within the full learning path (1-based across all capabilities)

fields.name: capability_sequence_no
fields.description: Order of this course within the same capability gap. e.g. for a gap of 3, this is 1, 2, or 3.

fields.name: from_level
fields.description: Capability level the learner is at when this course is assigned. Denormalized from courses.from_level.

fields.name: to_level
fields.description: Capability level the learner reaches when this course artifact is approved. Denormalized from courses.to_level.

fields.name: current_score
fields.description: Raw capability score 0–100 at the time this course was assigned

fields.name: current_level
fields.description: Learner's current capability level on the L0–L4 scale at assignment time. L0=no exposure, L1=awareness, L2=working knowledge, L3=applied skill, L4=mastery.

fields.name: required_level
fields.description: Minimum capability level required by the role. Sourced from role_capability_map.required_level at the time the learning path was generated.

fields.name: gap
fields.description: Computed gap = required_level - current_level. Positive means learner needs improvement. Zero or negative means no gap.

fields.name: has_gap
fields.description: True if gap > 0. Used by the recommendation engine to identify capabilities needing courses.

fields.name: gap_score
fields.description: Gap expressed as a 0–100 score for path prioritization and ranking. Derived from current_score vs target score.

fields.name: priority_band
fields.description: Recommendation priority band. A = highest priority gap, B = secondary gap, none = no gap or not yet prioritized.

fields.name: why_needed
fields.description: Why this capability is needed for the learner's target role. Populated for priority A and B rows.
fields.example: Monitor production systems and diagnose runtime issues

fields.name: how_to_build
fields.description: How the learner should build this capability. Populated for priority A and B rows.
fields.example: Complete observability course with logging, debugging, and monitoring tools

fields.name: status
fields.description: Learner's current status for this course

fields.name: badge
fields.description: Badge earned by the learner upon completing this course. Defaults to none until completed. 'Qualified' on standard completion; 'Pro' on exceptional performance.

fields.name: completion_percentage
fields.description: Course completion percentage 0–100 based on module progress

fields.name: started_at
fields.description: When the learner started this course

fields.name: completed_at
fields.description: When the learner completed this course (all artifacts approved)

constraints.name: chk_current_level_range
constraints.description: current_level must be on the L0–L4 scale

constraints.name: chk_required_level_range
constraints.description: required_level must be on the L0–L4 scale

constraints.name: chk_gap_computed
constraints.description: gap must always equal required_level - current_level

constraints.name: chk_has_gap_consistent
constraints.rule: (gap > 0 AND has_gap = true) OR (gap <= 0 AND has_gap = false)
constraints.description: has_gap must be true when gap > 0 and false otherwise

constraints.name: chk_badge_only_on_completion
constraints.description: A badge can only be awarded when the course status is completed

constraints.name: chk_badge_values
constraints.description: badge must be one of the defined enum values

constraints.name: chk_priority_band_values
constraints.description: priority_band must be one of the defined enum values

unique_constraints.name: uq_lpc_learner_path_course
unique_constraints.description: One course assignment per learner per path — prevents duplicates

indexes.name: idx_lpc_learner_path_role
indexes.description: Fetch all course assignments for a learner scoped to a specific path and role

indexes.name: idx_lpc_learner_has_gap
indexes.description: Fetch all courses where learner has a gap — primary input to recommendation engine

indexes.name: idx_lpc_learner_priority_band
indexes.description: Fetch all priority A or B course assignments for a learner

indexes.name: idx_lpc_status
indexes.description: Filter course assignments by progress status for a learner

indexes.name: idx_lpc_badge
indexes.description: Fast fetch of all badge-earned courses in a path for dashboard/profile display

indexes.name: idx_lpc_course_id
indexes.description: Look up all learner assignments for a given course

indexes.name: idx_lpc_role_course
indexes.description: Look up required level for a course within a role

relationships.description: Each course assignment belongs to one learner
Each course assignment is scoped to one learning path
Each course assignment is assessed against one role
Each row references a course which carries capability_id, level_no, and all capability metadata
required_level is sourced from role_capability_map at path generation time

sample_records.why_needed: Monitor production systems and diagnose runtime issues
sample_records.how_to_build: Complete observability course with logging, debugging, and monitoring tools

sample_records.why_needed: Monitor production systems and diagnose runtime issues
sample_records.how_to_build: Complete observability course with logging, debugging, and monitoring tools
Learn REST/GraphQL principles and database indexing strategies
